title: CatBoost correction weight 0.075
summary: Set the CatBoost correction weight to 0.075 against the RealMLP core.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Change only the fixed CatBoost blend weight to 0.075: final = 0.925 * realmlp_core + 0.075 * catboost_pred. Keep everything else unchanged.
expected_effect: Probe the likely sweet spot between 0.05 and 0.10 CatBoost contribution.
risk: Small CV differences among weights may be noise.
